title: selaginella cruciformis
intro: Selaginella cruciformis, also known as the Mexican pepperwort or Mexican spikemoss, is a species of evergreen fern-alternate plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Selaginella cruciformis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Selaginella cruciformis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often consumed to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
